category_sources: source_facts.description says it outputs current CPU temperature for OSX; official GitHub README documents CPU, GPU, ambient temperature, and fan speed output options.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is osx-cpu-temp; official GitHub README heading is OSX CPU Temp.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README contains usage, compiling, running, output examples, and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/lavoiesl/osx-cpu-temp, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a macOS CPU temperature CLI; official README lists temperature and fan speed options using Apple SMC-derived data.
